title: Device Sensors (Accelerometer, Gyroscope)
description: Read data from motion sensors for interactive experiences.

slides.title: Motion Sensors 🎮
slides.content:
# Accelerometer and Gyroscope

Modern phones have sensors that detect motion and orientation. You can use them to create games, step counters, or tilt‑controlled UI.

Expo provides `expo-sensors` for accessing these.

- **Accelerometer**: measures acceleration in m/s² (including gravity).
- **Gyroscope**: measures rotation rate in rad/s.
- Also: Magnetometer, Pedometer, etc.

slides.title: Installation and Subscription

quizData.question: What method sets how often the accelerometer updates?

slides.title: Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content: Don't set the update interval too low (e.g., < 16ms) as it may drain battery. For UI animations, 100ms is usually sufficient.
